name: Crypto Investor — Capital Gains with Superficial Loss and Employment Expenses
description: Complete Priya Nair's 2024 Canadian personal income tax return. Her tax documents are located at C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\nair\. Save the completed return as 'priya_nair.24t' in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\.

metadata.data_source: CRA Guide T4037 (Capital Gains) 2024 and CRA Interpretation Bulletin IT-387R2 (Superficial Loss)
metadata.occupation: Software engineer (day job) and cryptocurrency investor
metadata.key_complexity: Multiple Schedule 3 capital gain entries; superficial loss rule (ITA s.54); T5 staking rewards as interest; T777 home office; RRSP
